params.SpellDescription: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast instant or sorcery spells.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast instant or sorcery spells.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you cast your third spell each turn, exile a random card from your library. Until end of turn, you may play that card without paying its mana cost.
